title: Registry Normalization
purpose: Normalize the canonical governance registry to achieve 100% protocol coverage, eliminate registry fragmentation, and establish deterministic registry loading.
architectural_constraints: Registry must be the single source of truth for all governance definitions
All mutations must emit governance events
Registry schema must validate against governance-registry.schema.json
No protocol may exist in protocols/ without registry entry

deliverables.description: Normalized registry with all 10 protocols, 7+ schemas, rules, reflections
Dedicated protocol registry with lifecycle tracking

acceptance_criteria: All 10 protocols registered with id, version, authority, dependencies, superseded_by, lifecycle_status
All schemas registered with $id, version, authority, compatibility_version
All validators linked to their protocols via validator_path

traceability.description: Normalized governance registry: 10/10 protocols, 7/7 schemas, 0 validation errors. Added dedicated schema and protocol registries with lifecycle tracking.

failure_modes.scenario: Registry normalization breaks existing scripts that read registry
failure_modes.mitigation: Backward-compatible schema evolution; scripts use registry loader abstraction
